roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/CAL:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)/AJW/CH1:CJ 3 Y/X:LOW TERM/X:PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H), THE SENTENCE IS TO BE SERVED AS FOLLOWS:/X:1 YEAR OF THESENTENCE IS TO BE SERVED IN CUSTODY IN THE COUNTY JAIL ANDTHE REMAINING 2YEARS ARE TO BE SERVED ON SUPERVISED RELEASE,/CTS:1 D/PRCS: 2 YEARS/DNACOMP/SECFEE40/ICNA/VF4:200/COLLECT/DEF:IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT IMMEDIATELY TO CHECK IN WITH A,P,D, PENDING SURRENDER TO THE COUNTY JAIL/SUR:1-30-12/CTORD:TERMS OF SUPERVISED RELEASE ARE AS FOLLOWS:/X:REMAIN EMPLOYED AND SHOW PROOF OF EMPLOYMENT TO A,P,D,/WEAP/WS/RX/DTC/PC/PSR/BKFEE/CTORD:SEIZED FIREARMS AND NARCOTICS ARE TO CONFISCATED ANDDESTROYED/ /X:DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED PURSUANT TO PC1170(H),/
/CAL:PRETRIAL/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:2/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:11-17-11/ARBUCKLE/DISM3/CONTD:SENTENCING/TWS/DOP/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IN DEPT 20 ON 10-06-11 IS CONVERTED TO A SETTING DATE, MATTER ALSO SET IN DEPT 23 FOR PRETRIAL CONFERENCE ON THAT DAY/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIM HEARING/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE ON 09-14-11 IN DEPARTMENT 23/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 10-06-11 IN DEPARTMENT 20/DOP/TE:3 HOURS/
/CAL:INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA, AND COUNSEL/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/987,2/BAIL:160,200/CONTD: PREHEARINGCONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:SURRENDER/X:THE DEFENDANT SURRENDERED IN OPEN COURT TO SERVE THE SENTENCE THAT WAS IMPOSED ON 11-17-11/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIM HEARING/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:CASE SETTLED IN DEPARTMENT 23/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X:A,D,A VAN LY IS NOT AVAILABLE TODAY/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/
